industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Pamukova Yenilenebilir Elektrik Uretim A.S.
summary: Pamukova Yenilenebilir Elektrik Uretim A.S. engages in the construction and operation of power plants in Turkey. It operates a 6,744 MW hydroelectric power plant. The company was formerly known as Bomonti Elektrik Muhendislik Musavirlik Insaat Turizm Ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Pamukova Yenilenebilir Elektrik Uretim A.S. in December 2020. Pamukova Yenilenebilir Elektrik Uretim A.S. was founded in 2007 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
